app.title: INCLUSIFY
app.tagline: Detect and improve LGBTQ+ inclusive language in academic writing.
app.footerTagline: Built with accessibility and inclusion in mind.

admin.title: Analytics Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Monitor platform usage and gather insights
admin.topTermsDesc: Most frequently flagged terms across all analyses

home.heroHeadline: Write with respect, clarity, and inclusion.
home.heroSub: Identify outdated or biased language and get inclusive alternatives and references.
home.demoSubtitle: Watch how INCLUSIFY detects and suggests improvements in real-time
home.demoText: The study examined homosexual participants and their experiences. Normal people often have different perspectives on healthcare access.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to more inclusive academic writing
home.step1Desc: Drop your PDF, DOCX, PPTX, or paste text directly. Your data stays private.
home.step2Desc: Advanced NLP identifies outdated, biased, or problematic language patterns.
home.step3Desc: Receive suggestions with explanations and academic references to improve your writing.
home.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to ensure your academic work is respectful and up-to-date
home.ctaSubtitle: Join researchers and academics who are making their work more accessible and respectful.

smartDetection.title: Smart Detection Engine
smartDetection.desc: Advanced NLP models detect problematic terms, outdated terminology, and biased assumptions in your text.

bilingualSupport.title: Bilingual Support
bilingualSupport.desc: Full support for both Hebrew and English, serving local and international academic communities.

gradedAlerts.title: Graded Alerts
gradedAlerts.desc: Issues classified by severity: outdated, biased, potentially offensive, or factually incorrect.

exportableReports.title: Exportable Reports
exportableReports.desc: Download comprehensive reports with flagged issues and suggestions to share with peers.

educationalResources.title: Educational Resources
educationalResources.desc: Built-in glossary explaining LGBTQ+ concepts and inclusive writing practices.

privacyFirst.title: Privacy First
privacyFirst.desc: Private mode available - no text stored without consent. Your data stays yours.

features.detect: Detect LGBTQ+ biased or outdated language
features.severity: Graded alerts with explanations and sources

analyzer.noIssues: No issues detected in this preview.
analyzer.uploadDesc: Upload your academic document to check for inclusive language
analyzer.dragDrop: Drag and drop your document here, or click to browse
analyzer.fileError: Please upload a PDF, DOCX, PPTX, or TXT file
analyzer.fileSizeError: File size must be less than 10MB

processing.takingLonger: Analysis is taking longer than usual...

recommendations.outdated: Update terminology to current inclusive standards
recommendations.biased: Revise framing to avoid implicit bias
recommendations.offensive: Replace potentially offensive language with respectful alternatives
recommendations.excellent: Excellent! Your text demonstrates inclusive language practices

analyzer.noIssuesMessage: Your text demonstrates inclusive language practices.
analyzer.serviceUnavailable: Analysis service temporarily unavailable. You can still browse.

errors.generic: Unable to analyze document. Please try again.
errors.passwordProtected: This PDF is password-protected. Please remove the password and try again.
errors.corruptedFile: The file appears to be corrupted. Please try a different file.
errors.tooManyPages: This document exceeds the 50 page limit. Please try a shorter document.
errors.fileTooLarge: This file exceeds the 50MB limit. Please try a smaller file.
errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload file. Please try again.

guestPrompt.title: Create an account to save your analysis history

privateMode.label: Private mode
privateMode.tooltip: Your document will not be stored. Analysis runs in memory only.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

glossary.title: LGBTQ+ Glossary
glossary.subtitle: A comprehensive guide to LGBTQ+ terminology for inclusive academic writing. Definitions sourced from leading advocacy organizations.
glossary.sourcesDesc: Definitions are sourced from leading LGBTQ+ advocacy organizations and are regularly updated to reflect current terminology and understanding.
glossary.noResults: No terms found matching your search.
